examples: There has been a shift from smokestack industries into high-tech ones.
Men in suits watch an experimental smog-control device on a smokestack in 1948.
Enel advertisements for the project show a young girl erasing a plant's smokestack.
Even as Syracuse's population topped out at 221, 000 in 1950, the city's smokestack-based economy began belching.
Critics argued that rules designed to regulate 19th-century smokestack industries could not be applied to the computer business.
